Description: Draft feature for populating the final to_print folder once selection is complete.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create the final to_print/dayXX folder structure for selected photos.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Selected photos can be materialized into the required to_print folder layout.

Stories.StoryName: Copy or move selected outputs safely
